zh.lifeSummary: 當Susannah Vardry於1708年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加马里兰普林斯 格奧智也斯時，她的父親John Vardry64歲，母親Elizabeth Cage51歲。她於從1724年1月到1724年12月與William McBee結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1759年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州哈利法可享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Susannah Vardry于1708年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加马里兰普林斯 格奧智也斯时，她的父亲John Vardry64岁，母亲Elizabeth Cage51岁。她于从1724年1月到1724年12月与William McBee结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1759年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州哈利法可享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: Vardry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Nir, Hagit, Itzik, Moshe, Yehoshua.
English: nickname from Middle English fair(e), vair ‘fair, beautiful’ (see Fair ) + dai ‘day’, perhaps used as a farewell expression.
Jewish (Israeli): from Hebrew vardi ‘of rose’, translating any of the many Ashkenazic surnames beginning with Rosen-.

variants.name: Fair
meanings: English: nickname meaning ‘handsome, beautiful, fair’, Middle English fair, fayr, Old English fæger. The word was also occasionally used as a personal name in Middle English, applied to both men and women.

Irish: translation into English of Gaelic fionn ‘fair’, which Woulfe describes as a ‘descriptive epithet that supplanted the real surname’, or a shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac F(h)inn, a variant of Mag Fhinn (see McGinn ).

nameMeanings.name: Susannah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Susanna  , in  2003  the most common in this group of names. It is the form of the name used in the Old Testament. The tale of Susannah, wife of  Joachim , and the elders who falsely accused her of adultery, is to be found in the apocryphal book that bears her name, and was popular in the Middle Ages and later.

en.lifeSummary: When Susannah Vardry was born in 1708, in Prince George's, Maryland, British Colonial America, her father, John Vardry, was 64 and her mother, Elizabeth Cage, was 51. She married William McBee from January 1724 to December 1724. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1759, in Halifax, Virginia, British Colonial America, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Susannah Vardry est née en 1708, à Prince George's, Maryland, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, John Vardry, avait 64 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Cage, avait 51 ans. Elle a épousé William McBee du janvier 1724 au décembre 1724. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1759, à Halifax, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Susannah Vardry 1708 in Prince George's, Maryland, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Vardry 64 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Cage 51. Sie hat von Januar 1724 bis Dezember 1724 William McBee geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1759 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Halifax, Virginia, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Susannah Vardry è nata il nel 1708 nel Prince George's, Maryland, British Colonial America, sua padre, John Vardry, aveva 64 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Cage, aveva 51 anni. Lei sposato William McBee da gennaio 1724 a dicembre 1724. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1759, nel Halifax, Virginia, British Colonial America, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Susannah Vardryが1708年にイギリス植民地アメリカメリーランド州プリンス ジョージェ'スで生まれた時，父John Vardryは64歳，母Elizabeth Cageは51歳であった。から1724年1月まで1724年12月にWilliam McBeeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1759年にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州ハリファックスで51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Susannah Vardry(이)가 1708년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 메릴랜드 주 프린스 조그'스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Vardry(은)는 64세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Cage(은)는 51세였다. 그녀는 1724년 1월 부터 1724년 12월 까지 William McBee(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1759년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 할이파스에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Susannah Vardry nasceu em 1708, em Prince George's, Maryland, British Colonial America, seu pai, John Vardry, tinha 64 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Cage, tinha 51 anos. Ela casou-se com William McBee de janeiro de 1724 a dezembro de 1724. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1759, em Halifax, Virginia, British Colonial America, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Susannah Vardry родилась в 1708 г. в местности принц джеорге'с, Мэриленд, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени John Vardry было 64 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Cage, 51. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William McBee с январь 1724 по декабрь 1724. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1759 г. в местности хэлифакс, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Susannah Vardry nació en 1708, en Prince George's, Maryland, British Colonial America, su papá, John Vardry, tenía 64 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Cage, tenía 51 años. Se casó con William McBee desde enero de 1724 hasta diciembre de 1724. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1759, en Halifax, Virginia, British Colonial America, a la edad de 51 años.
